name: Proton Docs
description: End-to-end encrypted collaborative document editor by Proton AG, integrated into Proton Drive.

years.notes: Launched publicly July 3, 2024. Rounded-square app icon with radial gradient (purple #6D4AFF → cyan #34B8EE), light-blue document-corner blocks upper-right, and two white rounded-rect bars lower-left representing text lines.
